steps.title: Extract the starting wage and rate of change
steps.content: The minimum wage on January 1, 2015 is \$9.25 (at x=0). The wage increases by \$0.50 each subsequent year.

steps.title: Write the linear function
steps.content:
With initial value 9.25 and a yearly increase of 0.50:

$$f(x) = 9.25 + 0.50x$$

This matches choice C — C is correct.
